body: Thank you for your feedback. Tagging and routing to the team member(s) best able to assist.

## 🎯 Agentic Issue Triage

**Summary:** This bot-filed issue identifies documentation gaps in the `Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox` management library: a stale copy-paste service description, missing DataBox-specific Key Concepts, and no inline code examples or snippet-backed README content.

<details>
<summary>📋 Issue Details</summary>

**Package:** `Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox`
**Affected API:** README.md, `tests/Samples/` directory
**Scenarios:**
- README contains wrong service description copied from Customer Insights
- Key Concepts section lacks DataBox-specific content (job types, stages, shipping workflows)
- Examples section has no inline code for creating or listing DataBox jobs
- No `Snippet:` placeholders for `Update-Snippets.ps1` to populate

**Root ask:** Fix the stale README and add DataBox-specific documentation and code snippets.
</details>

<details>
<summary>🔎 Debugging / Reproduction Notes</summary>

This is a documentation-only issue filed by an automated workflow after commit #58496 added the `Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox` library. The implementation guide in the issue body provides specific file edits, a sample test file to create, and validation steps (build, test, Update-Snippets.ps1, Export-API.ps1).

**Suggested investigation steps:**
1. Fix the service description in `sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/README.md`
2. Add DataBox-specific Key Concepts section content
3. Create `sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/tests/Samples/Sample1_DataBoxJob.cs` with snippet-annotated tests
4. Add snippet placeholders in the README Examples section
5. Run `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 databox` to inject snippets and verify with `git diff`
</details>

<details>
<summary>🏷️ Label Confidence</summary>

- **Category:** `Mgmt` — Package name `Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox` clearly indicates a management-plane library
- **Service:** `DataBox` — Explicitly named in the issue title, body, and package path (`sdk/databox/`)
- **Confidence:** High — Unambiguous package name and service directory; `DataBox` label confirmed to exist in the repository (color #e99695)
</details>

<details>
<summary>👥 Owner Routing</summary>

- **Matched CODEOWNERS entry:** `# ServiceLabel: %Mgmt` (line 887) — scanning bottom-to-top, this entry (requiring only "Mgmt") is encountered before the `%DataBox` entry at line 679 (which has no `%Mgmt` qualifier)
- **AzureSdkOwners:** @ArthurMa1978
- **ServiceOwners:** none listed
- **Routing action:** Assigned `@ArthurMa1978` (single AzureSdkOwner); "needs-team-attention" not added since issue is bot-filed (no "customer-reported" label)
- **Scan notes:** All `%ServiceX %Mgmt` entries (e.g., `%SQL %Mgmt`, `%Compute - Fleet %Mgmt`) were encountered first but did not match because the issue lacks those specific service labels. `%DataBox` at line 679 would also match but is encountered after the `%Mgmt` catch-all in bottom-to-top order (line 887 > line 679).
</details>
